Title: Successful book checkout with valid borrower
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
And borrower exam.checkout-ready@example.com exists with no overdue items
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button for book 9005
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.checkout-ready@example.com'
And I verify borrower name and phone display
And I click checkout submit button
Then checkout should be successful
And stock should be decremented by 1
And checkout record should be created
And success message should be displayed
And book log should show new checkout event

Title: Checkout fails when borrower has overdue items
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
And borrower exam.return-late@example.com has overdue checkout on book 9002
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.return-late@example.com'
Then overdue warning banner should be visible with message that overdue borrowers cannot borrow
And checkout submit button should be disabled
And no checkout record should be created
And stock should remain unchanged

Title: Checkout fails when book is out of stock
Scenario:
Given book ID 9003 has stock equal to 0
And borrower exam.checkout-ready@example.com exists with no overdue items
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9003
And I click checkout action button
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.checkout-ready@example.com'
Then checkout submit button should be disabled
And message 'The selected book is out of stock.' should be displayed
And no checkout record should be created

Title: Checkout fails with invalid email format
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
And I enter invalid email format such as 'notanemail', 'test@', '@example.com', or 'test space@example.com'
Then checkout submit button should remain disabled for all invalid formats
And validation banner should show error message
And no borrower lookup should be performed
And no checkout record should be created

Title: Checkout fails with empty Library Member ID
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
And I leave Library Member ID input empty
Then checkout submit button should be disabled
And no borrower information should be displayed
And no checkout record should be created

Title: Checkout fails when Library Member ID not found in registry
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
And I enter non-existent Library Member ID 'nonexistent@example.com'
Then checkout submit button should be disabled
And validation message should indicate member not found
And no checkout record should be created

Title: Checkout fails when borrower already has the same book checked out
Scenario:
Given book ID 9001 has an active checkout by exam.return-on-time@example.com
And book 9001 has stock greater than 0
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9001
And I click checkout action button
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.return-on-time@example.com'
Then checkout submit button should be disabled
And message 'The borrower already has that book checked out.' should be displayed
And no duplicate checkout record should be created
And stock should remain unchanged

Title: Successful on-time return
Scenario:
Given book ID 9001 has an active checkout by exam.return-on-time@example.com
And the checkout date is today minus 7 days
And the due date is today plus 7 days and not overdue
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9001
And I click return action button
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.return-on-time@example.com'
And I verify borrower name and phone display
And I verify due date and return date display
And I click return submit button
Then return should be successful
And success message 'Returned "<book_name>" from Member One.' should be displayed
And stock should be incremented by 1
And checkout should be marked as returned
And no overdue fine should be displayed
And book log should show return event

Title: Successful overdue return with fine calculation
Scenario:
Given book ID 9002 has an active checkout by exam.return-late@example.com
And the checkout date is today minus 21 days
And the due date is today minus 7 days and is overdue by 7 days
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9002
And I click return action button
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.return-late@example.com'
And I verify borrower details display
And I verify overdue fine summary displays
And I click return submit button
Then return should be successful
And stock should be incremented by 1
And checkout should be marked as returned
And overdue fine should be calculated and displayed as Rp70000 (7 days * Rp10000)
And book log should show return event with fine amount

Title: Return fails when no active checkout exists
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has no active checkout
And borrower exam.checkout-ready@example.com exists
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click return action button
And I enter Library Member ID 'exam.checkout-ready@example.com'
Then return submit button should be disabled
And message 'No active checkout was found' should be displayed
And stock should remain unchanged
And no return record should be created

Title: Return boundary - submitted on exact due date is on-time
Scenario:
Given book ID 9001 has an active checkout with due date equal to today in GMT+7
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9001
And I click return action button
And I enter Library Member ID for the active checkout
And I verify return date equals due date
And I click return submit button
Then return should be processed as on-time
And no overdue fine should be displayed or calculated
And success message should be shown
And stock should be incremented
And book log should show on-time return

Title: Return one day overdue calculates single day fine
Scenario:
Given book ID 9002 has an active checkout with due date equal to yesterday in GMT+7
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9002
And I click return action button
And I enter Library Member ID for the active checkout
And I verify overdue fine summary
And I click return submit button
Then return should be successful
And overdue fine should be calculated as Rp10000 (1 day * Rp10000)
And stock should be incremented
And book log should show return with fine

Title: View book log with circulation history
Scenario:
Given book ID 9001 has checkout and return history
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9001
And I click show log action button
Then book log page should be displayed
And page title should show selected book ID and title
And log table should show all checkout and return events
And each entry should show event type, borrower name, checkout date, return date when applicable, and fine amount when applicable
And the newest events should appear first

Title: View book log with empty history
Scenario:
Given book ID 9004 has no borrowing history
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9004
And I click show log action button
Then book log page should be displayed
And page title should show selected book ID and title
And empty state message should be displayed
And no placeholder log entries should be shown
And log table should be empty

Title: Checkout calculates correct due date as 14 days in GMT+7
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
And the current library date in GMT+7 is known
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
And I enter valid Library Member ID 'exam.checkout-ready@example.com'
And I observe checkout date and due date display
And I complete checkout
Then checkout date should equal current date in GMT+7
And due date display should show exactly checkout date plus 14 days in GMT+7
And checkout record should be persisted with correct dates

Title: Return with multiple weeks overdue calculates accurate fine
Scenario:
Given book ID 9002 has an active checkout with due date equal to today minus 21 days (3 weeks overdue)
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9002
And I click return action button
And I enter Library Member ID for the active checkout
And I verify overdue fine summary calculation
And I complete return
Then overdue fine should be calculated as Rp210000 (21 days * Rp10000)
And fine amount should be displayed before submission
And return should be successful
And book log should show return with correct fine amount

Title: Verify stock atomicity during concurrent checkout attempts
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock equal to 1
And two different borrowers have no overdue items
When I simulate near-simultaneous checkout of book 9005 by both borrowers
Then only one checkout should succeed
And stock should decrement to 0
And the second checkout should fail with out-of-stock message
And database should maintain consistency
And no race condition should occur

Title: Verify checkout page displays all required DOM elements
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
Then checkout page wrapper 'checkout-page' should exist
And selected book ID 'checkout-selected-book-id' should display
And selected book title 'checkout-selected-book-title' should display
And available stock 'checkout-available-stock' should display
And Library Member ID input 'library-member-id-input' should exist
And member name display 'member-name-display' should exist
And member phone display 'member-phone-display' should exist
And checkout date input 'checkout-date-input' should exist
And due date display 'due-date-display' should exist
And submit button 'checkout-submit-button' should exist
And validation banner 'checkout-validation-banner' should exist

Title: Verify return page displays all required DOM elements
Scenario:
Given book ID 9001 has an active checkout
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9001
And I click return action button
Then return page wrapper 'return-page' should exist
And selected book ID 'return-selected-book-id' should display
And return book title 'return-book-title' should display
And Library Member ID input 'return-library-member-id-input' should exist
And member name display 'return-member-name-display' should exist
And member phone display 'return-member-phone-display' should exist
And due date text 'return-due-date' should display
And return date input 'return-date-input' should exist
And submit button 'return-submit-button' should exist
And validation banner 'return-validation-banner' should exist

Title: Verify book log page displays all required DOM elements
Scenario:
Given book ID 9001 has checkout and return history
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9001
And I click show log action button
Then book log page wrapper 'book-log-page' should exist
And selected book ID 'book-log-selected-book-id' should display
And selected book title 'book-log-selected-book-title' should display
And book log table 'book-log-table' should exist
And log rows with IDs 'book-log-row_<eventId>' should exist
And event type cells 'book-log-event_<eventId>' should exist
And borrower name cells 'book-log-borrower_<eventId>' should exist
And event date cells 'book-log-date_<eventId>' should exist

Title: Search book by exact book ID returns correct result
Scenario:
Given books 9001, 9002, 9003, 9004, and 9005 exist in the system
When I navigate to main book list page
And I enter exact book ID '9005' in search input 'book-search-input'
Then book list table should display exactly one row
And book row 'book-row_9005' should exist
And book ID cell 'book-id_9005' should display '9005'
And book title cell 'book-title_9005' should display correct title
And stock cell 'book-stock_9005' should display current stock
And action buttons for checkout, return, and show log should exist

Title: Search book by partial title returns matching results
Scenario:
Given multiple books exist with different titles
When I navigate to main book list page
And I enter partial book title in search input 'book-search-input'
Then book list table should display all matching books
And each matching book row should have correct book ID, title, and stock
And all action buttons (checkout, return, show log) should be present for each row
And non-matching books should not be displayed

Title: Reject XSS attempt in Library Member ID input on checkout
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
When I navigate to main book list page
And I search for book ID 9005
And I click checkout action button
And I enter script injection in Library Member ID '<script>alert(''XSS'')</script>@example.com'
Then input should be rejected
And script should not be executed
And validation error should be shown
And no checkout record should be created
And malicious input should not be stored in database

Title: Reject HTML injection in Library Member ID input on return
Scenario: Given book ID 9001 has an active checkout When I navigate to main book list page And I search for book ID 9001 And I click return action button And I enter HTML injection in Library Member ID '@example.com' Then input should be rejected And HTML or script should not be rendered or executed And validation error should be shown And no return should be processed And malicious input should not be stored

Title: Verify all validations exist on both client and server side
Scenario:
Given book ID 9005 has stock greater than 0
When I bypass client-side validation using browser dev tools
And I submit checkout with invalid email directly to server
And I submit checkout with empty member ID to server
And I attempt checkout for out-of-stock book
Then all invalid requests should be rejected by server with appropriate error messages
And server-side validation should match client-side rules
And no invalid data should be persisted
And security should be maintained
